top_signals.title: SpaceX’s Big AI Bond Bet | Open Interest 6/22/2026
top_signals.summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Stocks drift near records as oil drops on signs of progress in all-night US, Iran talks. Plus, SpaceX taps the bond market to fund its AI ambitions. Sam Fazeli breaks down AbbVie’s $10.9 billion Apogee deal, Former Federal Reserve Governor Randy Kroszner joins us on Greenspan’s Fed legacy, and Upside CEO Alex Kinnier joins Bloomberg Open Interest to talk about the squeezed consumer. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Are you overpaying? Why shippers should revisit emergency fuel surcharges now
top_signals.summary:
Amid the Iran conflict, the introduction by ocean carriers of emergency bunker surcharges on top of standard adjustments created a risk that shippers were double-paying for fuel price increases.

The post Are you overpaying? Why shippers should revisit emergency fuel surcharges now appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: For a 3rd month in a row, Saia opens new terminals
top_signals.summary:
LTL carrier Saia has opened two new Midwest terminals, the third month in a row with openings.

The post For a 3rd month in a row, Saia opens new terminals appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
